title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to set up and use Claude Code for free by running it locally with Ollama and an open-source LLM like Qwen 3.5. The video covers installation, configuration, and building a complete agentic AI travel application with multiple agents and a Flask-based UI.
